name: apple-mcp
description: Apple MCP tools for contacts, notes, messages, mail, reminders, calendar, and maps
long_description: Apple MCP gives LLMs access to Apple's native macOS apps including Contacts, Notes, Messages, Mail, Reminders, Calendar, and Maps. Provides granular flat tools for every operation — search, read, create, update, delete — enabling comprehensive automation of daily tasks.

tools.name: notes_list
tools.description: List notes, optionally filtered by folder

tools.name: notes_search
tools.description: Search notes by title or content

tools.name: notes_get
tools.description: Get full content of a note by name

tools.name: reminders_list
tools.description: List reminders, optionally filtered by list

tools.name: reminders_complete
tools.description: Mark a reminder complete by ID

tools.name: messages_read
tools.description: Read messages from a phone number

tools.name: calendar_list
tools.description: List events in a date range

tools.name: calendar_search
tools.description: Search events by title or notes

tools.name: calendar_get
tools.description: Get full details of an event by UID

tools.name: calendar_update
tools.description: Update fields on an existing event

tools.name: calendar_get_free_busy
tools.description: Get busy blocks in a date range

tools.name: maps
tools.description: Search locations, get directions, manage guides

tools.name: mail_search
tools.description: Search emails by query, sender, subject, date, flags

tools.name: mail_get
tools.description: Get full content of an email

tools.name: mail_unread_count
tools.description: Get unread count for account or mailbox

tools.name: mail_move
tools.description: Move an email to a mailbox

tools.name: mail_batch_move
tools.description: Move multiple emails to a mailbox

tools.name: mail_list_mailboxes
tools.description: List mailboxes with unread and total counts

tools.name: mail_save_attachment
tools.description: Save an email attachment to disk

tools.name: mail_save_template
tools.description: Create or update an email template

tools.name: mail_get_template
tools.description: Get a saved email template by ID

tools.name: mail_enable_rule
tools.description: Enable a mail rule by name

tools.name: mail_disable_rule
tools.description: Disable a mail rule by name

tools.name: mail_search_contacts
tools.description: Search Contacts by name or email
